rows.label: qev070302_MSG0001
rows.name:
...How did it go? Did you find
someone looking like Doc?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070302_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Eh? Only the Mirarian
was left behind?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070302_MSG0008
rows.name:
Doc... Where is he wandering
around in a dangerous place like
the White Tree Continent...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070302_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Hey, there's a green panel inside the
Mirarian. Could you push it for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070302_SEL0021
rows.name:
Do not press the button
because it is suspicious.

rows.label: qev070302_MSG0004
rows.name:
What? A rebellious phase? Are you
feeling the urge to rebel against
whatever you can? Just push it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070302_MSG0005
rows.name:
...See? When you do that, Doc's current
location popped right up, didn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070302_MSG0006
rows.name:
He might be caught up in
some incident like before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070302_MSG0007
rows.name:
Please hurry to that location. I'm counting
on you, absolutely bring Doc back![ST:wait ]
